result:
**Goal: Add a live population sparkline graph to the status bar that visualizes cell count over time.**

This would render a compact Unicode sparkline (using characters like `▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█`) showing the last ~40 generations of population history directly in the status bar. It gives immediate visual feedback on whether a pattern is growing, oscillating, dying, or stabilizing — turning raw numbers into an at-a-glance trend line. It's a natural evolution of the existing history/age tracking and makes watching simulations far more informative.

Shall I implement this?
